race.comment: FURIOUS (11) was a surprise winner over this track and trip two-back, then given little chance from back in the field with a respectable sixth over 1600m at this track. Winning rider sticks and looks a great each way play over his preferred distance. BEAR ON THE LOOSE (4) tough on-pace stayer who comes to hand quickly. Sat on the fast tempo on resumption with a game third over 1600m at this track. Will appreciate the sting out of the ground and will prove hard to run down from the low draw. UNLIMITED (2) comes here deep into the campaign and strips fitter after returning from a layoff over the unsuitable 1600m when seventh at this track. Gets the gun run with Grima's claim and not without genuine top-three prospects. MR MONACO (6) comes up from Victoria with sound second-up credentials. Chipped away late on resumption when fifth over 1600m at Caulfield in similar grade. On the up and gets an economical run from the draw.
